title: Auto vault backup on every mutation
description: Vault corruption = data loss. sweech backup exists but is manual. Write a fresh encrypted backup on every accounts mutation, keeping last 7.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 2: "Vault corruption = data loss. sweech backup exists but is manual. Should write ~/.sweech/backups/vault-YYYY-MM-DD.zip on every accounts mutation, keeping last 7"

acceptanceCriteria: Every accounts add/remove/import/refresh writes a fresh backup
Encrypted with the same AES-GCM scheme as manual backup, keyed off ~/.sweech/.backup-key (generated on first run)
